toolSpec.name: dynamodb_data_modeling
toolSpec.description: Retrieves the complete DynamoDB Data Modeling Expert prompt.

toolSpec.name: dynamodb_data_model_schema_converter
toolSpec.description: Retrieves the DynamoDB Data Model Schema Converter Expert prompt.

generate_usage_data.description: Set to False if user only wants schema.json without usage examples/sample data. Set to True (default) to generate both schema.json and usage_data.json with realistic sample data for code generation

toolSpec.name: dynamodb_data_model_schema_validator
toolSpec.description: Validates a schema.json file - the structured JSON representation of your DynamoDB data model.

schema_path.description: Absolute path to the schema.json file to validate

usage_data_path.description: Optional absolute path to the usage_data.json file to validate alongside the schema

toolSpec.name: source_db_analyzer
toolSpec.description: Analyzes source database to extract schema and access patterns for DynamoDB modeling.

database_name.description: Database name to analyze. REQUIRED for self_service. Env: MYSQL_DATABASE.

execution_mode.description: 'self_service': generates SQL for user to run, then parses results. 'managed' (MySQL only): RDS Data API-based access (aws_cluster_arn) or Connection-based access (hostname+port).

queries_file_path.description: [self_service] Output path for generated SQL queries (Step 1).

query_result_file_path.description: [self_service] Path to query results file for parsing (Step 2).

pattern_analysis_days.description: Days of query logs to analyze. Default: 30.

max_query_results.description: Max rows per query. Default: 500. Env: MYSQL_MAX_QUERY_RESULTS.

aws_cluster_arn.description: [managed/RDS Data API-based] Aurora cluster ARN. Use this OR hostname, not both. Env: MYSQL_CLUSTER_ARN.

aws_secret_arn.description: [managed] Secrets Manager ARN for DB credentials. REQUIRED. Env: MYSQL_SECRET_ARN.

hostname.description: [managed/connection-based] MySQL hostname. Use this OR aws_cluster_arn, not both. Env: MYSQL_HOSTNAME.

output_dir.description: Absolute path for output folder. Must exist and be writable. REQUIRED.

toolSpec.name: dynamodb_data_model_validation
toolSpec.description: Validates and tests DynamoDB data models against DynamoDB Local.

workspace_dir.description: Absolute path of the workspace directory

toolSpec.name: compute_performances_and_costs
toolSpec.description: Calculate DynamoDB capacity units and monthly costs from access patterns.

access_pattern_list.description: List of access patterns with operation details (required)

table_list.description: List of table definitions for storage cost calculation (required)

workspace_dir.description: Absolute path of the workspace directory (required). Cost analysis will be appended to dynamodb_data_model.md

toolSpec.name: generate_resources
toolSpec.description: Generates resources from a DynamoDB data model JSON file (dynamodb_data_model.json).

dynamodb_data_model_json_file.description: Absolute path to the dynamodb_data_model.json file. Resources will be generated in the same directory.

resource_type.description: Type of resource to generate: 'cdk' for CDK app

toolSpec.name: generate_data_access_layer
toolSpec.description: Generate Python code for a data access layer to interact with your DynamoDB tables.

schema_path.description: Path to the schema JSON file

generate_sample_usage.description: Generate usage examples and test cases

usage_data_path.description: Path to usage_data.json file for realistic sample data (optional)
